metadata.description: Biohacker's toolbox — 45+ biometric analytics across 8 wearable providers, CGM glucose, and gut intelligence.

plugins.name: bio-vibing
plugins.description: Connect wearables + CGM + nutrition to Claude Code. 45+ novel metrics, cycle detection, glucose analytics, pattern discovery. Supports Oura, Whoop, Fitbit, Apple Health, Garmin, Open Wearables, Dexcom, Nightscout.
